data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: README.md rewritten to minimal content (title + INSTALL.md pointer). All acceptance criteria pass: brew install ast-grep absent from README.md, [test_install_doc_contract] absent from .test-index, test-install-doc-contract.sh 13/13 PASS, ruff check PASS. Pre-existing test suite failures confirmed pre-existing (same failures before/after change).
